name: HostInfo
summary: The HostInfo collector shows a device's hostname, physical IP address, and operating system version.

fields.name: connection_status
fields.description: Displays the device's status of Quarantined or Online

fields.name: platform
fields.description: The device's operating system (Windows, macOS, Linux)

examples.title: Example: Find all devices with Windows operating system.
Who are the active users in my enterprise
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE InteractiveSessions userid not equals ""
            AND InteractiveSessions name not equals ""

examples.title: Where has user JDOE logged-in
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE InteractiveSessions userid equals "jdoe"

examples.title: Find if a list of users logged-in to one target PC
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE HostInfo hostname equals "PC1"
            AND InteractiveSessions userid equals "jdoe"
                OR InteractiveSessions userid equals "alice" 
                OR InteractiveSessions userid equals "bob"

examples.title: Show me all logins to one target PC
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE HostInfo hostname equals "PC1"
            AND InteractiveSessions userid equals "jdoe"
                OR InteractiveSessions userid equals "alice" 
                OR InteractiveSessions userid equals "bob"

examples.title: Show me all Logins to one Target PC
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE HostInfo hostname equals "W10-LATEST"
            AND InteractiveSessions userid not equals ""

examples.title: Show me all logins to many target PCs
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND InteractiveSessions userid, name
        WHERE HostInfo hostname equals "PC1"
            OR HostInfo hostname equals "PC2"
            OR HostInfo hostname equals "PC3"

examples.title: Discover which systems have extensions installed - single
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
   AND Files created_at, last_write, name
      WHERE Files full_name contains "hddjhjcbioambdhjejhdlobijkdnbggp"

examples.title: Discover which systems have extensions installed - many
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
   AND Files created_at, last_write, name
      WHERE Files full_name contains "hddjhjcbioambdhjejhdlobijkdnbggp"
         OR Files full_name contains "efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj"
         OR Files full_name contains "jlhmfgmfgeifomenelglieieghnjghma"

examples.title: Confirm a chrome manifest file is present
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
   AND Files created_at, last_write, name
      WHERE Files full_name contains "hddjhjcbioambdhjejhdlobijkdnbggp"
         OR Files full_name contains "efaidnbmnnnibpcajpcglclefindmkaj"
         OR Files full_name contains "jlhmfgmfgeifomenelglieieghnjghma"
            AND File name equals "manifest.json"

examples.title: Discover number of systems and versions of the target software
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND Software installdate, publisher, version, displayname
        WHERE Software displayname contains "zoom"

examples.title: Discover source locations used to download the target software
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND BrowserDownload referrer, site_url, mime_type, browser, user_profile
        WHERE BrowserDownload file_path contains "zoom"

examples.title: Get some hashes, might be good for app control
examples.v2_query:
HostInfo hostname
    AND BrowserDownload referrer, site_url, mime_type, browser, user_profile
        WHERE BrowserDownload file_path contains "zoom"
